items.title: Germans Don’t Love Budweiser. It Won’t Take No for an Answer.
items.summary: Not for the first time, Budweiser is trying to make it in Germany. But this is a tough time to sell German drinkers on the image and taste of American beer.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Teenager arrested after two girls, 13, seriously injured in German school attack
items.summary: Police said a major operation was under way in the area of Welfen-Gymnasium secondary school in Schongau, Bavaria.
